command_checks.output_tail:
{
    "schema": "dreamco.buddy_laptop_safety.v1",
    "mission": "Keep Buddy useful on the owner laptop without freezing, leaking secrets, spending money, damaging files, or taking live account actions without approval.",
    "resource_limits": {
        "min_free_disk_gb": 5,
        "max_load_average_1m": 10,
        "min_battery_percent": 15,
        "max_command_seconds_cap": 300,
        "min_background_sleep_minutes": 15,
        "background_default_sleep_minutes": 60
    },
    "secret_key_policy": {
        "store_values_in_repository": false,
        "store_values_in_reports": false,
        "print_values_to_logs": false,
        "recommended_local_storage": [
            "macOS Keychain",
            "environment variables",
            "provider dashboards",
            "GitHub Actions secrets for CI only"
        ],
        "buddy_can_do": [
            "detect missing secret names",
            "create setup checklists",
            "prepare rotation plans",
            "prepare masked status reports",
            "verify that code reads secrets from environment variables"
        ],
        "buddy_cannot_do_without_owner_approval": [
            "create live credentials",
            "change live credentials",
            "paste secrets into third-party forms",
            "commit secrets",
            "email or message secrets",
            "store raw secrets in generated files"
        ]
    },
    "app_task_policy": {
        "safe_by_default": [
            "open local dashboard",
            "scan repository",
            "prepare signup packets",
            "prepare account setup checklists",
            "fill local test forms",
            "draft support messages",
            "draft pull request notes",
            "run local tests"
        ],
        "approval_required": [
            "submit signups",
            "accept terms",
            "grant repository or account access",
            "connect payment accounts",
            "send messages",
            "publish content",
            "deploy apps",
            "buy domains",
            "change billing",
            "delete or overwrite user data"
        ]
    },
    "damage_prevention": [
        "Prefer dry runs and report generation before live action.",
        "Stop background mode when disk, load, or battery safety checks fail.",
        "Keep generated logs out of git.",
        "Redact token-like values from command output before writing reports.",
        "Require owner approval for any external account, money, credential, deploy, signup, outreach, social, legal, medical, credit, employment, tenant, or identity action."
    ]
}
